title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 1–4, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Nojiko starts revealing the past that shaped Nami, Bellemere, and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not really interested in her past.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Take a walk? You're not going to listen?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's just the kind of guy he is.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But we'll listen to what you have to say.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Though I doubt hearing your story will change anything.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't just fall asleep as soon as you say that!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, I, for one, will listen to understand what's going on.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No wonder they're giving Nami so much trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just a little more and every- thing'll be back the way it used to be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's just one book, what's the big deal!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You dumb brat! A bookstore's supposed to have a lot of books!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How many times must I tell you that stealing is inexcusable!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But my family's poor, I can't help it!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
